title: Handheld Garment Clothes Steamer, 1800W Steamer Clothing for Portable, 150°C Turbo Extreme Penetrating Steam Wrinkle Reduction, 20s Fast Heat up Steam iron for Travel, Home, Office
features: [Instant Wrinkle Release] With one-touch steam activation, our handheld clothes steamer features rapid 20-second preheating and an intelligent LED indicator (turns green when ready). Unleash powerful bursts of steam (1800W high-power core) to penetrate deep into fabric folds, delivering quick wrinkle release for garments, curtains, and plush toys. Perfect for travel steamer use or home & office ironing

[Professional High Temperature Steam Sterilization] This garment steamer combines 15-minute continuous steam (25g/min flow rate) with 150°C high-temperature sterilization, eliminating 99.9% of bacteria on clothes, upholstery, and stuffed animals

[Ultra-Portable & Travel-Ready] Weighing only 0.8kg, this portable steamer for clothes boasts a compact handheld steamer design that fits in purses or suitcases. The 220ml detachable tank steams up to 10 shirts per fill, while the 1.9m detachable cord ensures flexible use. This travel steamer for clothes and home & office use

[Leak-proof safety design] This steam iron in addition to the vertical ironing function, horizontal ironing is also possible, resulting in 360-degree ironing that effectively removes all wrinkles from your garments. In addition, the advanced leak-proof technology ensures that the appliance will not leak no matter which way it is facing during use

[Multi-scenario use] The Steam Iron for Clothes can Ironing, crease removal and sterilization. This clothes steamer is deemed safe for application on a variety of delicate clothes materials, including but not limited to soft cotton, silk, velvet, wool, linen, polyester, nylon, organic textiles, as well as household items such as curtains, bed linens, cushions, sofas, and children's toys
